summary:
## Lane HC-001: Break up ipc.ts god module

Successfully decomposed the 395-line `packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts` into 8 focused modules:

### Created modules
- **ipc-helpers.ts** (21 lines) — shared writeQueues/serializedWrite helpers
- **ipc-locale.ts** (16 lines) — locale preference in-memory storage
- **ipc-init.ts** (75 lines) — deps delegation handlers (init flow, updater, server config)
- **ipc-session.ts** (52 lines) — session import/export via dialog
- **ipc-store.ts** (56 lines) — electron-store CRUD with reserved namespace guard
- **ipc-fs.ts** (78 lines) — file pickers, shell ops, clipboard, notifications
- **ipc-window.ts** (59 lines) — window controls, zoom, titlebar, menu actions
- **ipc-config.ts** (101 lines) — custom agents, MCP servers, plugin configs

### Modified
- **ipc.ts** (395→57 lines) — rewritten as thin composer calling all sub-module registrations

### Preserved
- All exports: `registerIpcHandlers(deps)`, `sendSqliteMigrationProgress`, `sendMenuCommand`, `sendDeepLinks`, `getStoredLocale`
- External interface unchanged (index.ts imports untouched)
- `registerGithubIpcHandlers()` call preserved
- All dirty file changes from prior sessions untouched

### Verification
- `npx tsgo -b` — no new type errors in src/main/
- Only pre-existing errors remain (solid-js declarations, electron-mock types)

### Files created
8 new module files in packages/desktop/src/main/
